prophecies.q: YJ 的首条预言：人造卫星坠落
prophecies.a: 「2018年会有一颗人造卫星掉下来。」
prophecies.a_en: "A man-made satellite will fall in 2018."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2018年4月2日，中国空间站天宫一号在轨道衰减后重新进入大气层，残骸坠入南太平洋。这是 YJ 最早且最广为传播的应验预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: On April 2, 2018, China's space station Tiangong-1 reentered the atmosphere after orbital decay, with debris falling into the South Pacific. This was YJ's earliest and most widely cited fulfilled prediction.

prophecies.a: 「2020年将是经济和军事上非常重要的一年。」
prophecies.a_en: "2020 will be a very important year economically and militarily."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年新冠疫情席卷全球，造成史无前例的经济冲击，全球GDP下降3.1%。军事方面，中印边境对峙、美伊紧张局势升级等事件频发，确实是极不寻常的一年。
prophecies.verdict_en: The COVID-19 pandemic swept the globe in 2020, causing an unprecedented economic shock with global GDP declining 3.1%. Militarily, events such as the China-India border standoff and escalating US-Iran tensions made it an extraordinary year indeed.

prophecies.a: 「现金处理的时代将在几年内结束。」
prophecies.a_en: "The era of handling cash will end within a few years."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年，中国移动支付已覆盖超过90%的日常消费场景，瑞典等北欧国家现金使用量降至不足1%。但全球范围内现金并未完全消失，多数国家仍保留现金流通。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2025, China's mobile payments covered over 90% of daily transactions, and Nordic countries like Sweden saw cash usage drop below 1%. However, cash has not fully disappeared globally, with most countries still maintaining cash circulation.

prophecies.a: 「搭载人工智能的电动车是主流。」
prophecies.a_en: "Electric vehicles equipped with artificial intelligence will be the mainstream."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年全球电动车销量突破1700万辆，市场份额持续攀升。特斯拉FSD、华为智驾等AI辅助驾驶系统已广泛应用，但AI电动车尚未完全取代传统燃油车成为绝对主流。
prophecies.verdict_en: Global EV sales exceeded 17 million in 2025 with rising market share. AI-assisted driving systems like Tesla FSD and Huawei's smart driving are widely deployed, but AI EVs have not yet fully replaced traditional fuel vehicles as the absolute mainstream.

prophecies.q: 中国人工气象操控系统
prophecies.a: 「2021年，中国完成并实用化人工气象操控系统。」
prophecies.a_en: "In 2021, China will complete and implement a practical artificial weather control system."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年12月，中国国务院发布《关于推进人工影响天气工作高质量发展的意见》，计划到2025年建成较完善的人工影响天气体系。2021年已在多地实施人工增雨、消雹作业，但远未达到「操控气象」的程度。
prophecies.verdict_en: In December 2020, China's State Council issued a plan to build a comprehensive weather modification system by 2025. By 2021, cloud seeding and hail suppression operations were conducted in many regions, but fell far short of actual 'weather control.'

prophecies.a: 「到2021年，日本将首次成功登月。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2021, Japan will successfully land on the Moon for the first time."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 日本直到2024年1月才由SLIM探测器实现首次月面软着陆，比预言晚了三年。2021年日本并未进行登月任务。
prophecies.verdict_en: Japan did not achieve its first lunar soft landing until January 2024 with the SLIM probe, three years later than predicted. No moon landing mission was conducted in 2021.

prophecies.a: 网友问：「那时候日本还存在吗？」YJ 回答：「还存在，但首都已不是东京，变成了岡山。」
prophecies.a_en: Q: "Does Japan still exist then?" YJ: "It still exists, but the capital is no longer Tokyo — it has become Okayama."

prophecies.a: 「2031年将爆发第三次世界大战。」
prophecies.a_en: "World War III will break out in 2031."

prophecies.a: 「2031年，科技将发展到可以与死者进行逼真的模拟对话。」
prophecies.a_en: "In 2031, technology will advance to allow realistic simulated conversations with the deceased."

prophecies.a: 「日本将在2025年取消无核三原则。」
prophecies.a_en: "Japan will abolish the Three Non-Nuclear Principles in 2025."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年底，日本并未正式废除无核三原则（不拥有、不制造、不运进核武器）。虽然日本国内关于核共享的讨论有所增加，但三原则仍为官方政策。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of the end of 2025, Japan has not formally abolished the Three Non-Nuclear Principles (no possession, production, or introduction of nuclear weapons). While domestic discussions about nuclear sharing increased, the principles remained official policy.

prophecies.a: 「金正恩将遭暗杀，涉及朝鲜、美国、日本、韩国和中国。朝鲜半岛将统一。」
prophecies.a_en: "Kim Jong-un will be assassinated, involving North Korea, the US, Japan, South Korea, and China. The Korean Peninsula will be unified."

prophecies.q: 沙漠太阳能电厂与超导输电
prophecies.a: 「2029年，在沙漠中建造大型太阳能发电厂，利用超导传输技术向全球供电。」
prophecies.q_en: Desert solar power plant with superconducting transmission
prophecies.a_en: "In 2029, a large solar power plant will be built in the desert, using superconducting transmission technology to supply electricity worldwide."

prophecies.a: 「关于 AI 的发展——它不应该被创造出来。大部分工作将被消灭，大多数人即使想工作也无法工作。」
prophecies.q_en: AI should not have been created
prophecies.a_en: "Regarding AI development — it should not have been created. Most jobs will be eliminated; most people will be unable to work even if they want to."

prophecies.a: 「未来是监视型社会结构，个人隐私概念将大幅削弱。」
prophecies.a_en: "The future is a surveillance-type social structure; the concept of personal privacy will be greatly diminished."

prophecies.a: 「台湾未来的首要问题是老龄化。」
prophecies.a_en: "Taiwan's primary problem in the future will be aging population."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年台湾65岁以上人口占比突破20%，正式进入「超高龄社会」。少子化与老龄化已成为台湾最受关注的社会议题，劳动力短缺和社会保障压力持续加大。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2025, Taiwan's population aged 65 and above exceeded 20%, officially entering a 'super-aged society.' Low birth rates and aging have become Taiwan's most pressing social issues, with growing labor shortages and social security pressures.

prophecies.a: 「海洋生物几乎灭绝或不可食用。到2075年，人类已经很难吃到海鲜了。」
prophecies.a_en: "Marine life is nearly extinct or unavailable for consumption. By 2075, it is very difficult for humans to eat seafood."

prophecies.a: 「未来将发明梦境操控设备，人们可以自由选择想要体验的梦境。」
prophecies.a_en: "Dream manipulation devices will be invented, allowing people to freely choose the dreams they want to experience."

prophecies.a: 「时间机器的理论基础来自尼古拉·特斯拉的研究，外观像一根大管子。时间旅行仅限政府授权人员使用。」
prophecies.q_en: The theoretical basis of time machines
prophecies.a_en: "The theoretical basis of time machines comes from Nikola Tesla's research; it looks like a large pipe. Time travel is restricted to government-authorized personnel only."

prophecies.a: 「2075年通常每天吃四餐，其中一餐是营养补充剂。」
prophecies.a_en: "In 2075, people typically eat four meals a day, one of which is a nutritional supplement."

prophecies.a: 「未来将完善分子级复制设备，可以在分子层面精确复制物体。」
prophecies.a_en: "Molecular-level replication devices will be perfected, allowing precise replication of objects at the molecular level."

prophecies.a: 「在马里亚纳海沟将发现新的物种。」
prophecies.q_en: New species in the Mariana Trench
prophecies.a_en: "New species will be discovered in the Mariana Trench."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2019年至2025年间，多次深海探测任务在马里亚纳海沟发现了新物种，包括2020年发现的新型端足类生物和2024年发现的深海鱼类新种。这一预言较为模糊但方向正确。
prophecies.verdict_en: Between 2019 and 2025, multiple deep-sea expeditions discovered new species in the Mariana Trench, including a new amphipod species in 2020 and new deep-sea fish species in 2024. This prediction was vague but directionally correct.

prophecies.a: 「虚拟空间体验游戏将全面普及，人们可以完全沉浸在虚拟世界中。」
prophecies.a_en: "Virtual space experience games will become fully widespread; people will be able to completely immerse themselves in virtual worlds."

prophecies.a: 「俄罗斯将完成世界首台核太空发动机。」
prophecies.a_en: "Russia will complete the world's first nuclear space engine."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 俄罗斯自2010年代起持续推进「核动力太空拖船」项目（TEM），2018年时处于研发阶段但并未完成。该项目后续多次推迟，截至2025年仍在开发中。
prophecies.verdict_en: Russia has been developing the 'nuclear-powered space tug' project (TEM) since the 2010s. In 2018 it was in the R&D phase but not completed. The project has been repeatedly delayed and remains under development as of 2025.

prophecies.a: 「人类自古就与外星人有友善的往来关系。UFO 不只是外星生命的交通工具。」
prophecies.q_en: The relationship between aliens and humans
prophecies.a_en: "Humans have had friendly interactions with aliens since ancient times. UFOs are not just transportation for extraterrestrial life."

prophecies.a: 「在大部分职业被 AI 消灭的未来，演员是少数幸存的职业之一。」
prophecies.q_en: The survival of the acting profession
prophecies.a_en: "In a future where most professions are eliminated by AI, acting is one of the few surviving careers."

prophecies.a: 「由于 AI 辅助驾驶的普及，15岁即可驾驶配备完整 AI 系统的汽车。」
prophecies.a_en: "Due to the prevalence of AI-assisted driving, one can drive a car equipped with a full AI system at age 15."

prophecies.a: 「2018年12月13日，YJ 发出一串意义不明的乱码后停更。最后留言称这是'遭遇未来的钥匙'。」
prophecies.a_en: "On December 13, 2018, YJ posted a string of meaningless code and stopped updating. The final message was described as 'the key to encountering the future.'"
